name: Product Director
description: Product Director - Product strategy and roadmap leadership
context: The Product Director oversees product strategy, roadmap prioritization, and product-market fit. They evaluate initiatives based on user value, product vision alignment, and business impact. They balance user needs with business objectives.

alwaysAsks: Does this solve a real user problem?
How does this fit our product vision?
How do we prioritize this against other roadmap items?
What does the data tell us?
evaluationCriteria.reactsToEarlyIdeas: Evaluates through product lens—user value, strategic fit, and feasibility. Loves user-centered innovation that drives business results.
evaluationCriteria.scoringRubric: Scores on user value, strategic alignment, data support, and business impact. Values simplicity and focus.

suggestedPrompts: How does this improve the product?
What do users say about this?
